name: Dump Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cherry pie filling or any kind you desire
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the cherry pie filling in the bottom of a 9x13 inch baking dish.
2. Spread the crushed pineapple over the cherries.
3. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix evenly on top of the pineapple mixture.
4. Melt the butter and pour it over the cake mix, ensuring even coverage.
5. Top with shredded coconut and chopped nuts.
6. Bake at 325°F (165°C) for 1 hour.
